overview.description: The BNY Mellon Core Plus ETF (BCPL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking high total returns through a fixed-income portfolio of US government securities and global corporate bonds. Selection relies on proprietary, internally generated credit research BCPL was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
